response.justification: Candidate's profile is a poor match for a C++ Capital Markets role. C++ exposure is limited to ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor thesis project, far short of the required 5–10 years. There is no Windows-platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience (MongoDB and MySQL instead), and no financial services, investment banking, or fixed-income domain background. Core stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, which does not satisfy any of the mandatory criteria.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with strong testing/TDD discipline
Solid SQL exposure (MySQL) and broad polyglot background including Java and Python-adjacent scripting
Experience with CI/CD, Docker, and distributed/high-throughput systems
concerns: Negligible recent C++ experience; does not meet 5–10 year mandatory bar
No Windows platform, SQL Server, or Oracle experience
Zero capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain exposure
